name: server.R
content:
library(shiny)
library(zoo)
library(reshape2)

server <- function(input, output, session) {
      #reactive values 
      rv <- reactiveValues(db = NULL, 
                           rmr = NULL,
                           cols = NULL, 
                           nature = NULL,
                           freq = NULL,
                           severity = NULL,
                           duration = NULL
                           )

      #rolling mean 
      roll_mean <- function(x, rww) {
	      roll.m <- rollapply(data = x, 
                                width = rww, 
                                FUN = mean, 
                                align = "right")
	      roll.m <- c(rep(NA, rww - 1), roll.m)
      return(roll.m)
      }	
      #severity
      severity <- function(db, mit, mis, rww, nts) {
            ll <- length(mis)
            sr <- vector("list", ll)
            for   (i in 1:length(mit)) {
		      mit.l <- paste0(mit[i], nts)
	   	      sf <- paste0(ifelse(mis[i] == "-", "min", "max"), 
                               "(db[, mit.l], na.rm = T)") 
		      sfe <- eval(parse(text = sf))
                  #severity location
                  sl <- which(db[, mit.l] == sfe)
                  #severity indices
                  si <- lapply(sl, function(x) x - (0:(rww - 1)))
                  si <- sort(unique(c(si, recursive = TRUE)))
                  #severity result
                  sr.l <- cbind(db[si, 1, drop = F], indicator = mit[i])
                  sr[[i]] <- sr.l
                  }
            sr <- do.call("rbind", sr)
      return(sr)
      }
      #duration
      duration <- function(db) {
            db <- db[order(db[, 1]), ]
            per.u <- db[!duplicated(db[, 1]), ]
            cd <- c(0, diff(per.u[, 1]))
            dl <- c(which(cd > 360 + 10), nrow(per.u) + 1)
            #downturn periods#
            dtp <- c()
            for   (i in 1:length(dl)) { 
                  if    (i == 1) {dtp <- c(dtp, rep(i, (dl[i] - 1)))}
                        else {
                        dtp <- c(dtp, rep(i, dl[i] - dl[i - 1]))
                        }
                  }
            per.u <- cbind(per.u[, -2, drop = F], downturn_period = dtp)
            per.u$duration <- ave(per.u$downturn_period, per.u$downturn_period, FUN = "length")
      return(per.u)
      }


      #selectInput width
      ww <- 300
      #data import
      data <- reactive({req(input$file)
                        tabs_state(FALSE)
                        rv$nature <- NULL
                        read.csv(input$file$datapath)
                        })
      #tabs state variable initiation (severity, duration, graph)
      tabs_state <- reactiveVal(FALSE)

      #run dtpi process
      observeEvent(input$run_btn, {
            tabs_state(TRUE)
            db <- data()
            db[, 1] <- as.Date(db[, 1])
            db <- db[order(db[, 1]), ]
            rv$db <- db
            cols <- names(db)[-1]
            freq <- as.numeric(input$frequency)
            rmr <- data.frame(sapply(X = db[, cols], 
                                     FUN = roll_mean, rww = freq))
            names(rmr) <- paste0(names(rmr), "_rolling")
            rv$rmr <- cbind.data.frame(db[, 1, drop = FALSE], rmr)
            rv$cols <- cols
            rv$nature <- c(lapply(X = cols, 
                                FUN = function(col) isolate(input[[paste0("sign_", col)]])),
                           recursive = TRUE)
            names(rv$nature) <- cols
            rv$freq <- freq
            #severity results
            rv$severity <- severity(db  = rv$rmr, 
                                    mit = rv$cols, 
                                    mis = rv$nature, 
                                    rww = rv$freq, 
                                    nts = "_rolling")
            #duration results
            rv$duration <- duration(db = rv$severity) 
            })
       
      #dynamic ui part (nature, severity, duration, graph)
      output$main_ui <- renderUI({
            req(input$file)
            db <- data()
            cols <- names(db)[-1]
       
            tabs <- list(
              tabPanel(title = "Nature",
                       lapply(X = cols, 
                              FUN = function(col) {
                                selectInput(inputId = paste0("sign_", col),
                                            label = col,
                                            choices = c("-", "+"), 
                                            selected = if (!is.null(rv$nature[col])) rv$nature[col] else "-",
                                            width = ww)}),
                       br(),
                       actionButton("run_btn", "Run DTPI Process"))
              )
              
            if    (tabs_state()) {
                  tabs <- c(tabs, 
                            list(tabPanel(
                                   title = "Severity",
                                   tableOutput("severity_tbl")),
                                  
                                 tabPanel(
                                   title = "Duration",
                                   tableOutput("duration_tbl"))
                                   )
                            )
                  }

            tagList(
            #data frequency
            wellPanel(h4("Data Frequency"),
                      selectInput(inputId = "frequency",
                                  label = "Select Data Frequency",
                                  choices = c(1, 4, 12),
                                  selected = 4,
                                  width = ww),
                      tags$small("1 = yearly, 4 = quarterly, 12 = monthly")),
            
            #merge panels and tabs dynamically
            wellPanel(do.call(tabsetPanel, tabs)),
        
            #graph (dynamic element)
            if    (tabs_state()) {
                  wellPanel(h4("Downturn Period Visualisation"),
                            plotOutput("graph"))
                  }
            )
            })
	
      #severity table
      output$severity_tbl <- renderTable({
        req(tabs_state())
        severity <- rv$severity 
        severity[, 1] <- as.character(severity[, 1])
        severity
      })
       
      #duration table  
      output$duration_tbl <- renderTable({
        req(tabs_state())
        duration <- rv$duration 
        duration[, 1] <- as.character(duration[, 1])
        duration
      })
         
      #dpi graph    
      output$graph <- renderPlot({
        req(tabs_state())
         
        db.m <- melt(rv$db, id = names(rv$db)[1])
        ui <- unique(isolate(rv$severity$indicator))
        db.m$color <- "grey"
        for   (i in 1:length(ui)) {
              si <- rv$severity[, 1][rv$severity$indicator%in%ui[i]]
              db.m$color[db.m$variable%in%ui[i] & db.m[, 1]%in%si] <- "red"
              }
        #base R graph
        date_col <- names(rv$db)[1]
        vars <- unique(db.m$variable)
        par(mfrow = c(length(vars), 1),
            mar = c(4, 4, 3, 1),  
            oma = c(0, 4, 3, 0)) 
        for (v in vars) {
            sub <- db.m[db.m$variable == v, ]
            sub <- sub[order(sub[[date_col]]), ]
            bar_colors <- ifelse(sub$color == "red", "red", "grey")
            barplot(height = sub$value,
                    names.arg = sub[[date_col]],
                    col = bar_colors,
                    border = NA,
                    main = v,
                    xlab = "Dates")
            }
        #title
        mtext("Severity per DTPI Variable", outer = TRUE, cex = 1.2, line = 1)
        #global y-axis label
        mtext("DTPI Variable Value", side = 2, outer = TRUE, cex = 0.7)

      })

}

name: ui.R
content:
ui <- fluidPage( titlePanel("Downturn Period Identification"), tags$head(tags$style(HTML(".tab-content {padding-top: 20px;} .tab-pane {padding-top: 10px;}"))), sidebarLayout( sidebarPanel( h4("Regulatory Background"), helpText("Under the CRR framework (Articles 181 and 182), complemented by the EBA Guidelines on downturn LGD and Commission Delegated Regulation (EU) 2021/930, institutions are required to identify economic downturn periods separately for each exposure class using relevant macroeconomic and credit-related indicators, including specification of downturn nature, severity, and duration."), br(), h4("DTPI Application"), helpText("The Downturn Period Identification (DTPI) application supports practitioners in specifying the nature, severity, and duration of downturn periods while addressing regulatory requirements. Although the application provides basic functionalities, practitioners are encouraged to further assess the proper preparation of inputs and interpretation of outputs, both for this and any other tool used for the same purpose."), br(), h4("Application Instructions"), helpText(HTML( "1. Upload a CSV file (first column should contain time values in the format 'yyyy-mm-dd').
2. Select data frequency.
3. Select variable signs in the Nature tab.
4. Click 'Run DTPI Process' to generate results, including tables for severity and duration as well as the DTPI chart." )), tags$hr(), fileInput(inputId = "file", label = "Upload CSV File", accept = c("text/csv", "text/comma-separated-values,text/plain", ".csv") ), div(style="margin-top:-15px;font-size:13px;color:#666;", "Expected input: CSV file with the first column containing dates in the format 'yyyy-mm-dd' and the remaining columns containing numeric variables") ), mainPanel(uiOutput("main_ui")) ) )
